products.name: Sony WH-1000XM6
products.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 40-hour battery life. Perfect for travel, work, and deep focus sessions.
products.fullDescription:
The Sony WH-1000XM6 raises the bar for active noise cancellation. The new QN2e processor eliminates 30% more ambient noise than its predecessor. With 40-hour battery life and quick charging (3 hours of playback from a 10-minute charge), these headphones are perfect for frequent travelers.

Key Features

  • Industry-leading ANC
  • 40-hour battery life
  • LDAC support for high-res audio
  • Multipoint Bluetooth connection
  • Speak-to-chat technology

products.name: ErgoFlex Professional Mesh Chair
products.description: Ergonomic mesh chair with 4D adjustable armrests, lumbar support, and breathable mesh back. Perfect for long work sessions.
products.fullDescription:
Back pain from sitting 8+ hours is real. The ErgoFlex Chair solves this with 8-point adjustable ergonomics. The breathable mesh keeps you cool, while the 4D armrests and adjustable lumbar support ensure perfect posture.

Why You'll Love It

  • Reduces back pain within days
  • Breathable mesh - no more sweaty back
  • Fits users from 5'2" to 6'5"
  • 10-year warranty for peace of mind

products.name: MacBook Pro 14-inch M3 Pro
products.description: The ultimate laptop for creators. M3 Pro chip with 12-core CPU, 18-core GPU, and 36GB unified memory.
products.fullDescription:
The M3 Pro chip brings desktop-class performance to a laptop. The Liquid Retina XDR display is stunning for HDR content. With 22-hour battery life, you can work anywhere without hunting for an outlet.

Perfect For

  • Video editing in Final Cut Pro
  • 3D rendering and animation
  • Software development
  • Music production
